scope_note: v0.4.0 declares this baseline as per-language; v0.5.0 will move to baselines/go/performance-baselines.json (shape B). Units (allocs/op, ns/op, B/op) are intrinsically Go-specific. Cross-language perf comparison NOT a v0.5.0 goal — agents read this file only on Go-targeted runs.
note: Per-package benchmark baselines. ns/op + B/op + allocs/op. Regression gates: hot path +5%, shared +10%.

core/l2cache/dragonfly.backend: miniredis/v2 (in-process; used for unit-bench; real dfly integration bench deferred to CI infra)

BenchmarkGet.constraint_note: Miniredis in-process result 26.6us; real-dfly network overhead NOT measured in this wave. Headroom vs 200us target is 7.5x even before adding net RTT; deemed provisional PASS. Full dfly bench deferred to CI perf-lane.

BenchmarkHExpire.constraint_note: Miniredis stubs HEXPIRE; real HPEXPIRE family is integration-only. Number is lower bound.

BenchmarkEvalSha.constraint_note: 136.1us << 1ms; allocs/op dominated by Lua result marshalling.

BenchmarkPipeline_100.constraint_note: ~9.56us per command in 100-op batch, confirming amortisation vs 26.6us single GET.

missing_benchmarks.name: BenchmarkHSet
missing_benchmarks.note: TPRD §11.3 lists BenchmarkHSet but impl did not emit one. Set/HExpire cover similar paths; gap logged for future rev.

missing_benchmarks.name: A/B vs raw go-redis
missing_benchmarks.note: No A/B harness implemented. Cannot verify the <=5% overhead constraint in this run. Recommend adding BenchmarkGet_Raw vs BenchmarkGet in a follow-up slice.

tprd_s10_constraint_table.allocs_per_get_le_3: WAIVED-H8 (user accept-with-waiver 2026-04-18: declare target <=35 allocs/GET to match go-redis v9.18 floor; 32 becomes baseline; future regressions gate against 32+5% = 34. Phase-4 backlog item: add A/B harness measuring wrapper-only overhead per original constraint intent.)
tprd_s10_constraint_table.sustained_10k_ops_sec: UNMEASURED (no load test harness in-scope for Phase 3 unit/bench wave)
